text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The time has finally come for Mihono Bourbon
and I to take on the Twinkle Series.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Winning the Classic Triple Crown is both her and
her father's wish. In order to achieve that, she'll
have to overcome the challenge of long-distance
races.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, her natural aptitude is for
short-distance sprinting. A fellow trainer even
warns me not to ruin her talent.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mihono Bourbon calmly rejects the other trainer's
warning, however, and continues to work toward
making her and her father's dream a reality.
